channel.title: AI on Joseph Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Joseph Carlson

item.title: Local LLMs
item.description: Now you can use ChatGPT, or Claude, or Gemini, or Apple Intelligence. Just kidding, definitely not Apple Intelligence. For general queries, there’s absolutely nothing wrong with that, but in the back of your mind, you have to wonder where all your chat logs go. Deleted into the abyss of unknown history, fragments of a memory as they make their own impact of the next AI model, or stored just in case for a rainy day.

item.title: Why Apple Intelligence Failed
item.description:
As all big tech companies are throwing everything they have into artificial intelligence research and development, the one company nearly everyone agrees is losing the race is Apple. Since the launch of their AI phone without AI to releasing a research paper claiming it’s not their faults, a trend has started to emerge.

In this article, I’m going to lay out a few reasons why I believe the first trillion dollar company as missed the mark.
